mapper.update: UPDATE t_stock SET stock_num = stock_num - #{quantity}, available_num = available_num - #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND available_num >= #{quantity}
UPDATE t_stock SET stock_num = stock_num + #{quantity}, available_num = available_num + #{quantity} WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
UPDATE t_stock SET lock_num = lock_num + #{quantity}, available_num = available_num - #{quantity} WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND available_num >= #{quantity}
UPDATE t_stock SET lock_num = lock_num - #{quantity}, available_num = available_num + #{quantity} WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND lock_num >= #{quantity}
